marketplace-postgres._replaced: @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres (Node.js) — had SQL injection bypass defeating read-only mode
marketplace-postgres._note: crystaldba/postgres-mcp-pro (Python). --access-mode restricted: DDL/DML blocked at MCP layer, statement_timeout per query, all reads wrapped in transactions. Tools: get_top_queries (requires pg_stat_statements), analyze_workload_indexes (HNSW/IVFFlat recs), explain_query. Activate: DATABASE_URL in /opt/shadow-warden/.env. Install: pip install postgres-mcp-pro

marketplace-evm._note: Coinbase Developer Platform MCP. Used by x402 v2 settlement: check_usdc_balance, transfer_usdc, create_wallet. Activate by setting CDP_API_KEY_NAME + CDP_API_KEY_PRIVATE_KEY in /opt/shadow-warden/.env. Testnet: base-sepolia. Production: base. Never set CDP keys in .mcp.json directly.

shadow-warden-staff-tools._note: Paid MCP gateway — Shadow Warden staff tools (KYC/AML, SEO, BDR, Support). Per-call billing via Flex Credits or x402 USDC. Register: POST /marketplace/register. Fund: POST /marketplace/x402/fund. Pricing: $0.001 (KB lookup) – $0.10 (SAR draft). Gate is fail-open when X402_GATE_ENABLED=false (dev).

marketplace-otel._note: OpenLIT observability MCP. When OTEL_ENABLED=true, exposes get_traces, get_slow_spans, get_token_usage, get_error_rate for SOVA tool integration. Requires OPENLIT_API_KEY (free tier available). Install: pip install openlit-mcp

chrome-devtools._note: Google Chrome DevTools MCP (official). Provides Lighthouse audit, DOM accessibility tree inspection, and WebMCP attribute validation. Used by autonomous-security-loop and SOVA visual patrol. Requires Chrome/Chromium installed on the machine. Tools: lighthouse_audit, get_accessibility_tree, navigate, screenshot, evaluate_js. Pinned to commit 913308263bdc8042af74924b68dc39a374ad071d (github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp) instead of @latest for build reproducibility. NOTE: this entry was previously misplaced as a top-level sibling of mcpServers (never actually loaded) — moved inside mcpServers here.

_security_notes.confused_deputy: POST /marketplace/analytics/query enforces X-Agent-ID scoping. Pass caller_agent_id in request body or X-Agent-ID header so the endpoint rejects cross-agent DID references.
_security_notes.oauth_roadmap: Long-term: replace BEARER_TOKEN with OAuth 2.1 (RFC 9068) JWT assertions scoped to 'marketplace:read:{tenant_id}'. The analytics/query endpoint should validate 'sub' claim == caller_agent_id before executing SQL.
_security_notes.read_only: sqlite-mcp-server runs with READ_ONLY=true. No INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE can reach the DB through this transport — the SELECT-only gate in analytics/query is a defense-in-depth second layer.
_security_notes.evm_keys: CDP_API_KEY_PRIVATE_KEY must only be set via environment, never in .mcp.json or source. Use /opt/shadow-warden/.env on the server, loaded by Docker Compose.
_security_notes.postgres_restricted: marketplace-postgres uses postgres-mcp-pro --access-mode restricted. Production: create a dedicated read-only Postgres role (GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO mcp_reader) and use that connection string as DATABASE_URL for this MCP server, separate from the write-path DATABASE_URL used by warden.
